sourceText: Despite persecution, Priestley persevered in his scientific research. He emigrated to the United States, continuing his work in a new environment, and his scientific contributions were eventually recognized and celebrated.
translatedText: Duk da tsanantawa, Priestley ya dage a bincikensa na kimiyya. Ya yi hijira zuwa Amurka, ya ci gaba da aikinsa a cikin wani sabon yanayi, kuma a ƙarshe an gane gudummawar da ya bayar a kimiyya kuma an yi bikin.

sourceText: Progress is always a good thing, and the pursuit of it is still better.
translatedText: Ci gaba koyaushe abu ne mai kyau, kuma neman sa har yanzu yana da kyau.

sourceText: Emphasizes that developing and embracing new knowledge and technologies is essential for societal and individual advancement.
translatedText: Yana jaddada cewa haɓakawa da rungumar sabbin ilimi da fasaha suna da mahimmanci ga ci gaban al'umma da daidaikun mutane.

sourceText: If reason is our guide, we shall never lose our way.
translatedText: Idan hankali shine jagoranmu, ba za mu taɓa rasa hanyarmu ba.

sourceText: Suggests that rational thinking and judgment are crucial for making sound decisions and navigating challenges.
translatedText: Yana ba da shawarar cewa tunani na hankali da hukunci suna da mahimmanci don yanke shawara mai kyau da kewaya ƙalubale.

sourceText: Knowledge can remove the root of all evil.
translatedText: Ilimi zai iya kawar da tushen dukan mugunta.

sourceText: Expresses the belief that education and understanding can overcome prejudice, misunderstanding, and conflict.
translatedText: Yana bayyana imanin cewa ilimi da fahimta na iya shawo kan son zuciya, rashin fahimta, da rikici.

sourceText: There, where I have passed, the grass will never grow again.
translatedText: A can, inda na wuce, ciyawa ba za ta sake yin girma ba.

sourceText: This statement symbolizes the absolute destruction and terror brought by Attila's armies, showcasing his ruthless method of conquest.
translatedText: Wannan bayanin yana nuna cikakkiyar halaka da ta'addanci da sojojin Attila suka kawo, yana nuna hanyar cin nasara da rashin tausayinsa.

sourceText: A united people, under a single will, is a force that can shake the foundations of the world.
translatedText: Jama'a masu haɗin kai, ƙarƙashin wasiyya ɗaya, wani ƙarfi ne da zai iya girgiza tushen duniya.

sourceText: This reflects Attila's core leadership philosophy of unifying the scattered Hunnic and other tribes into a formidable empire.
translatedText: Wannan yana nuna ainihin falsafar jagoranci na Attila na haɗa tarwatsa Hunnic da sauran ƙabilun zuwa wata babbar daula.

sourceText: It is a miserable thing to be afraid of death, which is an inevitable end.
translatedText: Abin takaici ne a ji tsoron mutuwa, wanda shi ne ƙarshen da babu makawa.

sourceText: This quote represents the fatalistic worldview of a warrior culture, highlighting Attila's fearless nature in the face of constant warfare.
translatedText: Wannan magana tana wakiltar ra'ayin duniya mai kisa na al'adar mayaka, yana nuna halin rashin tsoro na Attila yayin fuskantar yaƙe-yaƙe.

sourceText: He grappled with the challenge of bridging the gap between the complex, Arabic-centric theology of the elite and the spiritual needs of the common Turkic-speaking people. This involved simplifying profound mystical concepts without losing their essence, a task that required immense spiritual and linguistic skill.
translatedText: Ya koka da kalubalen cike gibin da ke tsakanin hadadden tiyolojin fitattun mutane da larabci da kuma bukatu na ruhi na jama'a masu jin Turanci. Wannan ya haɗa da sauƙaƙe ƙa'idodin sufanci masu zurfi ba tare da rasa ainihin su ba, aikin da ke buƙatar ƙwarewar ruhi da harshe.
